name: coffLoader
description: Load a TeamServer-managed COFF object artifact and execute an exported function.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

coff_file.description: COFF/BOF tool artifact name or id from Tools.

function_name.description: Exported function to call, for example go.

packed_arguments.description: Optional COFF argument format and values, for example: Zs c:\ 0.
